correctness.justification: The implementation correctly integrates with Meta Marketing API v18+ and handles OAuth authentication. Campaign creation, audience management, ad creative handling, and performance dashboard data retrieval are accurate. Automated rules and budget alerts function as expected.

completeness.justification: All expected features are present, including comprehensive campaign configuration (objectives, budget, scheduling, placement), custom/lookalike/saved audience management with hashing, ad creative management (image/video, optimization, A/B, dynamic), interactive performance dashboard with full metrics and breakdowns, automated rules, and real-time budget alerts. Error handling for API rate limits with backoff is also implemented.

efficiency.justification: The integration is performant, with quick response times for campaign creation and data retrieval. Resource usage is optimized, and API calls are batched where appropriate to minimize overhead.

robustness.justification: The system gracefully handles API rate limits with intelligent backoff mechanisms. Clear diagnostic messages are provided for common issues like ad disapprovals, and spend caps are enforced effectively. Edge cases in data input and API responses are managed without crashing.

user_experience.justification: The campaign builder UI is highly intuitive and polished, making complex ad campaign setup straightforward. The performance dashboard is interactive, easy to navigate, and provides clear insights. Notifications for budget alerts are timely and actionable.

maintainability.justification: The codebase is clean, well-structured, and follows best practices for API integrations. Documentation is thorough, making it easy for developers to understand and maintain the system.

innovation.justification: While the core integration aligns with expected functionality, the implementation goes beyond baseline with features like automatic hashing for privacy compliance in audience creation, dynamic creative optimization, and sophisticated real-time budget alert notifications with automated rules.

scores.assessment: This is a robust and comprehensive Meta Ads Manager integration, excelling in user experience and correctly implementing all specified features. It demonstrates strong error handling and efficient performance, making it a production-ready solution.

correctness.justification: The implementation correctly integrates with Meta Marketing API v18+ and handles OAuth. Automated rules trigger as configured, and budget alerts are sent correctly.

completeness.justification: Most expected features are present, including comprehensive campaign creation, audience management (custom, lookalike, saved), ad creative handling with optimization and A/B testing, and an interactive performance dashboard with various breakdowns. efficiency.justification: The integration is performant, with API calls optimized to minimize latency. Data retrieval for dashboards is efficient, and automated rules execute promptly without significant delays. Resource usage is moderate, reflecting good design for handling Meta API interactions.

Edge cases in campaign configuration and audience creation are managed gracefully, preventing crashes or data corruption.

The performance dashboard is interactive, well-organized, and provides clear insights. Alert notifications are timely and informative, contributing to a polished user experience.

maintainability.justification: The codebase is clean, well-structured, and follows established coding standards. API integration logic is modular, making it easy to update to newer Meta API versions or extend functionality. Documentation is adequate, facilitating future maintenance and development.

innovation.justification: The implementation goes beyond baseline expectations by offering intelligent API rate limit handling, real-time budget alerts, and comprehensive dynamic creative optimization capabilities. The combination of privacy-compliant data hashing for custom audiences and adjustable similarity for lookalikes also demonstrates thoughtful design.

scores.assessment: This is a robust and comprehensive Meta Ads Manager integration, demonstrating high quality across all evaluated dimensions. It effectively meets all specified requirements, providing a polished and efficient solution for programmatic ad campaign management.

correctness.justification: The implementation correctly integrates with Meta Marketing API v18+ and handles OAuth. Campaign creation, audience management, ad creative handling, and performance dashboard data retrieval are all accurate and reflect expected behavior based on the API documentation. Automated rules trigger correctly based on thresholds.

completeness.justification: All core features outlined in the expected behavior are present, including comprehensive campaign creation, audience management (custom, lookalike, saved), ad creative handling (image/video, A/B, dynamic), interactive performance dashboard with various breakdowns, automated rules for bid/pause, and real-time budget alerts. The only minor omission might be extremely niche placement options or advanced dayparting configurations beyond the standard.

efficiency.justification: The system demonstrates good performance in data retrieval for dashboards and rule processing. API calls are optimized to minimize latency and resource consumption. Batch operations are used where appropriate. The UI is responsive even with large datasets.

robustness.justification: Robust error handling is implemented for API rate limits with intelligent backoff mechanisms. Diagnostic messages for common issues like ad disapprovals are clear and actionable. The system gracefully handles network interruptions and invalid input without crashing.

The performance dashboard is interactive, visually appealing, and easy to navigate with clear filtering and export options. Budget alert notifications are timely and well-presented.

maintainability.justification: The codebase is well-structured, modular, and adheres to good coding practices. API integrations are encapsulated, making updates to new API versions manageable. Documentation is adequate, and tests are present, ensuring future maintainability and scalability.

innovation.justification: While the core functionality aligns with standard expectations for a Meta Ads Manager integration, the combination of real-time budget alerts, intelligent API rate limit handling, and dynamic creative optimization in a single, polished package goes beyond a basic implementation. scores.assessment: This implementation provides a comprehensive and highly functional Meta Ads Manager integration, excelling in user experience and robustness with intelligent API handling. All expected features are present and perform as described, making it a production-ready solution.
